scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m='src/middleware.ts';if(!fs.existsSync(m))throw new Error('FATAL: '+m+' is missing.');const c=fs.readFileSync(m,'utf8');if(!/export (async )?function middleware|export default/.test(c))throw new Error('FATAL: '+m+' must export a function named middleware or a default export.');"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m='src/middleware.ts';if(!fs.existsSync(m))throw new Error('FATAL: '+m+' is missing.');const c=fs.readFileSync(m,'utf8');if(!/export (async )?function middleware|export default/.test(c))throw new Error('FATAL: '+m+' must export a function named middleware or a default export.');"
